reason: SolidWorks assembly (.SLDASM) — tidak didukung assimp/Blender; ekspor dari SolidWorks diperlukan

conversionAttempts.error: No suitable reader found for the file format of file .SLDASM

conversionInstructions: Buka assembly di SolidWorks. Sembunyikan part internal; simpan versi simplified hero mesh.
Ekspor: File → Save As → glTF/GLB (jika add-in tersedia), atau STEP/OBJ lalu konversi ke GLB.
Alternatif: export single simplified body sebagai FBX/OBJ, lalu:
Deploy LOD chain + model-manifest.json ke public/models/cnc-lathe/
